title: No Max Enchants
description: A plugin to enchant items with no level limits.
body:
# NoMaxEnchants

A simple plugin to enchant items without level limits.
For example:
Without this plugin, you couldn't do /enchant sharpness 10
But with this plugin, you can.

[CurseForge](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/bukkit-plugins/no-max-enchants)

# Usage

/enchant <enchantment> <level>

Based off of an (I assume private) plugin that lets you do that, so I recreated it.

This is a personal project (and will always be one) but you can donate if you want with the link on the side (this will be free forever no matter what).
